creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Wed Sep 19 07:40:37 2012
New Revision: 304485
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304485

Log:
  This port adds the Product Measurements Module to the Tryton Application
  Platform.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		171420
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/
  head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:27:57 2012	(r304484)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:40:37 2012	(r304485)
@@ -118,6 +118,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_ldap_connection
     SUBDIR += trytond_party
     SUBDIR += trytond_product
+    SUBDIR += trytond_product_measurements
     SUBDIR += trytond_product_price_list
     SUBDIR += trytond_project
     SUBDIR += trytond_project_plan

Added: head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:40:37 2012	(r304485)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_product_measurements
+# Date created:		07 September, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_product_measurements
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Product Measurements Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_product>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_product
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 07:40:37 2012	(r304485)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_product_measurements-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 5ee2be599f0d8c3d13d98c6dee472b6db23924e08fe4a6ef0a87b342d0d7f64f
+SIZE (trytond_product_measurements-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 19187

Added: head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_product_measurements/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 07:40:37 2012	(r304485)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+This port adds the Product Measurements Module to the Tryton Application
+Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
